series_metadata.series_description: Records document the release of the school, district, or ESC from liability related to various activities that include student, volunteer, or citizen involvement. Records may include but are not limited to release forms with terms, date, signatures, and related information. Includes athletic participation waivers and forms related to legal

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 years after school year in which records were created. In the event of accident or injury, retain until minor reaches the age 21 ; Electronic: 3 years after school year in which records were created. In the event of accident or injury, retain until minor reaches the age 21, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
